title: Queue job envelope, schema v2 (additive over v1)
description: Governs jobs/<id>.json. V1 (legacy) jobs have NO schema_version key and keep their existing behavior verbatim: checklist authoritative, project_id derived in memory from repo, adapter_id defaults to stellaris-game. V2 adds identity/profile/routing fields; every v1 field keeps its name and meaning forever (design doc 5.1). Readers tolerate unknown fields; queue files are never rewritten to migrate.

id.description: UTC-stamped job id; requeue successors get an r-number suffix and a fresh stamp; ids are never reused.

tier.description: Scheduling class. Known values: tier1, gui, restore, bootstrap. Preserved v1 field; scheduling invariants (Tier-1-before-gui, 90s yield) key off it.

repo.description: Preserved v1 field. V2 jobs also carry project_id; the worker verifies the two correspond through the registry (design doc 3.5).

commit_sha.description: Pinned commit the worker checks out (detached). Requeue sha-drift rules apply.

checklist.description: V1: authoritative test instructions. V2: a RENDERED SNAPSHOT of the effective profile (compatibility + human-readable); profile + hash are authoritative; snapshot/hash mismatch = infrastructure failure (design doc 5.3).

dispatch.description: gui dispatch mode: direct (default) or agent.

project_id.description: Registry key; must correspond to repo via known-mod-repos.json (evolved registry).

job_type.description: Known values: automated-check (generic profile run), stellaris-test (Tier-1 transaction), stellaris-gui (Tier-2 checklist), restore, bootstrap. Open set.

adapter_id.description: Known values: stellaris-game, generic-command. Workers refuse jobs whose adapter they lack (pre-claim eligibility).

project_config_revision.description: Revision the .agentops files resolve from. Normally equals commit_sha; a different value is permitted only when configuration deliberately lives outside the tested commit (design doc 5.2).

check_profile.description: Profile name in the project's checks.json. Authoritative for v2 jobs.

profile_parameters.description: Typed parameters the profile declares; undeclared keys are a profile-resolution failure.

effective_profile_hash.description: sha256 over the CANONICAL serialization of the effective profile (project id, pinned revision, profile name, base profile contents, typed parameters, amendments) — profile_runtime.effective_profile_hash. Recorded again in the result; submit-time vs run-time mismatch = profile-resolution failure.

tier.description: Tier 1 append-only step or tier 2 declared-field amendment. There is deliberately no 'replace' value (tier 3: never).

step.description: append-step: the appended checklist/command step text.

value.description: field: the new value (must match the declared type).

amendments.description: Structured amendment record (design doc 3.7). Every entry changes the effective hash and is stamped in the note for humans.

maximum_cost.description: USD ceiling for the run (enforced job ceiling, design doc 12).

priority.description: Ordering WITHIN a scheduling class (tier); never overrides tier order. Known values: low, normal, high.
